name: Double Deluxe All American Brownie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease lightly a 13x9 inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the sugar, flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt until well combined. Set aside.
4. In another bowl, mix melted butter with eggs and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just moistened.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the top is set and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
